chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-5978 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on Misc. No.26557/2024 (Exp/A) 3. For orders on Misc. No.26558/2024 (Stay/A) 4. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 07.10.2025 None present for petitioner ------------------------------ This petition was filed on 23.11.2024. It was last taken up on 03.12.2024, when none was present on behalf of the petitioner, without intimation. In the last 1 year, learned counsel for petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Today again, despite lapse of one year, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
